headline: Super Micro CEO: We’re at the Center of the AI Infrastructure Buildout
summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) just posted one of the most striking revenue beats in recent memory, and CEO Charles Liang is not shy about what it means for the company’s future. The numbers first: Q2 FY2026 revenue came in at $12.68 billion, against an estimate of $10.34 billion. Non-GAAP EPS of $0.69 came in above ... Super Micro CEO: We’re at the Center of the AI Infrastructure Buildout
